summary:
Perfect! Single leader elected (node 2). No split-brain.

The needle was found and fixed. The bug was in the quorum calculation in `app/cluster/node.go` line 124: `if finalVotes >= totalNodes/2 {` should be `if finalVotes > totalNodes/2 {` to require strict majority (more than half) rather than at least half. Additionally, the print statement on line 110 had swapped parameters which I also fixed.
